title: Mini Bear Plush Toy, Soft Comfortable Little Pocket Bear Hug, Teddy Bear in a Tin Box Bear Doll Christmas Birthday Gifts for Children (Pink)
features: 🧸【Small Pocket Bear Hug】- Contains 1 pink bear, 1 sleeping quilt, 1 tin box, and a gift card. Pocket bear hug can bring warmth to one's heart, make the people you care about smile.

🧸【Safe Material】- The small pocket bear is made of short plush, filled with PP cotton, soft and comfortable, not easy to be squeezed and deformed; the bear hug card is made of PVC, clear printing, waterproof and smooth; the tin box, showing the texture, can also be used to hold some of your small items, such as candy, chocolate, pearls, etc.

🧸【Warm Design】- Our gift cards are printed with warm words that can bring warmth and strength to your family or friends and help them cheer up. The little pocket bear cuddle toy is ideal for kids with anxiety and nightmares, put them in a handmade cotton sleeping bag at night, it's a great way to help them relieve stress and then reap the rewards of sweet dreams.
🧸【Easy to Carry】- Small and cute, light and portable, you can put it in a small pocket or pencil case to carry with you, or put it next to your pillow to accompany you through countless nights.

🧸【Ideal Gift】- The bear and quilt are separate. The bear is placed inside a handmade quilt and there is a gift card in the tin. It is the perfect gift for your loved ones, children, mothers, students, classmates, friends on birthdays, Christmas, Halloween, anniversaries, Valentine's Day, long distance relationships, Mother's Day, I miss you and I love you.

Specifications: Product Name：A Little Pocket Bear Hug Product Type: Plush Doll Plush Classification: Short Plush Filling Material: Sponge Color: Pink Size: As Shown in the Picture Package Size: 10 * 7 * 2.4 cm / 3.94 * 2.76 * 0.94 inches Package Weight: 47 g Package List: 1 * Small Pocket Bear 1 * Small Sleeping Quilt 1 * Tin Box 1 * Gift Card Attention: 1. Measured by hand, please allow a slight error in size! 2. Due to lighting effects and angles, there may be slight differences in product color, please understand! Safety Warning Children must be accompanied by an adult
